reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question asked. The question explicitly asks for the revenue 'in the years 2021 to 2024' (Wieviel Umsatz... in den Jahren), which implies an annual aggregation or comparison of yearly totals. Instead, this chart displays monthly data points for all four years overlaid on a single axis. This creates a confusing 'spaghetti' plot where it is difficult to discern trends per year because the lines cross frequently and represent different time periods mixed together. While the data values are correct, the granularity is wrong for the query; a user cannot easily read off the total yearly revenue from this chart without mentally summing up 12 points per line. A bar chart showing annual sums would be far more appropriate.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a column/bar chart aggregating the revenue by Year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) to directly show the total earnings per year as requested.
